Headline: #N66 Chicago Temporary Reroute at North Water/City Front Plaza
ShortDescription: N66 Chicago buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions, due to street blockage near North Water/City Front Plaza.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
#N66 Chicago buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions via North Water, Columbus, Randolph, Michigan, then resume their normal route, due to street blockage near North Water/City Front Plaza. 

Allow extra travel time.
